subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn! Blessed and beloved is thy name, and mentioned art thou in the Concourse on High. God willing, through the bounty of the Best-Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین اسمت مبارک و محبوبست و در ملا اعلی مذکور انشاء الله بعنایت محبوب عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @the concourse on high
